seo_questions.zh: 伊玛目巴基尔在《卡非》中关于圣裔家族在崇拜和认识真主中所起作用说了什么？

similar_content_hints.description: Hadiths in Usul al-Kafi's Kitab al-Hujja where the Imam declares that God cannot be known, worshipped, or obeyed except through the Imam, presenting the Imam as the necessary gate (bab) to all divine knowledge and worship.

Narrations in which the Imams describe themselves using divine-attribute metaphors such as 'the Face of God' (wajh Allah), 'the Side of God' (janb Allah), or 'the Eye of God' (ʿayn Allah), all conveying the same doctrine of Imami mediation between God and creation.

Hadith literature on the cosmological status of the Muhammadan Light (al-nur al-Muhammadi) or the Prophet as the first creation, establishing the Prophet's role as the primordial intermediary — a parallel to the concept of Muhammad as hijab Allah.

summaries.bn: ইমাম মুহাম্মদ আল-বাকির (আলাইহিস সালাম) ঘোষণা করেন যে আহলুলবাইত হলেন অপরিহার্য মধ্যবর্তী, যাঁদের মাধ্যমে আল্লাহর ইবাদত, পরিচয় ও তাওহিদ সম্পন্ন হয়। নবী মুহাম্মদকে 'আল্লাহর হিজাব' বলার মাধ্যমে ঐশ্বরিক সত্তায় প্রবেশ কেবল নবুওয়াত ও ইমামাতের মাধ্যমে সম্ভব — এ মূলনীতি শিয়া আকিদায় তাওহিদ ও ইমামাতকে অবিচ্ছেদ্যভাবে যুক্ত করে।
summaries.de: Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (Friede sei auf ihm) erklärt, dass die Ahl al-Bayt die unentbehrlichen Mittler sind, durch die Allah angebetet, erkannt und als Einziger anerkannt wird. Die Bezeichnung des Propheten als 'Schleier Allahs' zeigt, dass der Zugang zum Göttlichen Wesen nur durch prophetische und imamische Autorität möglich ist — ein grundlegendes Glaubensprinzip der schiitischen Theologie, das Tawhid und Imamat untrennbar verbindet.
summaries.en: Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (peace be upon him) asserts that the Ahl al-Bayt are the indispensable intermediaries through whom God is worshipped, known, and declared One — collapsing any notion of tawhid divorced from their authority. The declaration that the Prophet Muhammad is a 'veil' (hijab) of God signals that the Divine Essence is accessible to creation only through prophetic and Imami mediation, a cornerstone of Shia creedal theology.
summaries.es: El Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (la paz sea con él) declara que los Ahl al-Bayt son los intermediarios indispensables a través de quienes Dios es adorado, conocido y proclamado como Uno. Describir al Profeta como el 'velo de Dios' indica que el acceso a la Esencia Divina sólo es posible mediante la autoridad profética e imámica — un principio doctrinal fundamental en la teología shií que une inseparablemente el tawhid y el imamate.
summaries.fa: امام محمد باقر (علیه السلام) بیان می‌فرمایند که اهل‌بیت واسطه‌ای ضروری برای عبادت، معرفت و توحید خداوند هستند و هیچ‌یک از این‌ها بدون آنان امکان‌پذیر نیست. توصیف پیامبر اکرم (صلی الله علیه وآله وسلم) به عنوان «حجاب الله» نشان می‌دهد که دسترسی به ذات الهی تنها از راه نبوت و امامت ممکن است؛ اصلی بنیادین که در کلام شیعی توحید و امامت را جدایی‌ناپذیر می‌داند.
summaries.fr: L'Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (que la paix soit sur lui) affirme que les Ahl al-Bayt sont les intermédiaires indispensables par lesquels Dieu est adoré, reconnu et déclaré Un. Qualifier le Prophète de 'voile de Dieu' signifie que l'accès à l'Essence Divine n'est possible qu'à travers l'autorité prophétique et imamique — un principe doctrinal fondamental de la théologie chiite liant indissociablement le tawhid et l'imamat.
summaries.id: Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (as) menegaskan bahwa Ahlulbayt adalah perantara yang tidak tergantikan dalam penyembahan, pengenalan, dan penetapan keesaan Allah. Penggambaran Nabi Muhammad sebagai 'hijab Allah' menunjukkan bahwa akses kepada Dzat Ilahi hanya mungkin melalui otoritas kenabian dan imamah — prinsip akidah fundamental dalam teologi Syiah yang menghubungkan tauhid dan imamah secara tak terpisahkan.
summaries.ru: Имам Мухаммад аль-Бакир (мир ему) утверждает, что Ахль аль-Байт являются необходимыми посредниками, через которых поклоняются, познают и признают единство Аллаха. Описание Пророка как 'завесы Аллаха' указывает на то, что доступ к Божественной Сущности возможен лишь через пророческий и имамский авторитет — основополагающий принцип шиитского богословия, неразрывно связывающий таухид с имаматом.
summaries.tr: İmam Muhammed el-Bâkır (a.s.), Ehl-i Beyt'in Allah'a ibadet, O'nun tanınması ve birliğinin ikrarı için vazgeçilmez bir aracı olduğunu beyan etmektedir. Hz. Peygamber'in 'Allah'ın hicabı' olarak nitelendirilmesi, İlahi Zat'a erişimin yalnızca nübüvvet ve imamet otoritesi aracılığıyla mümkün olduğunu göstermekte; bu da Şii kelamında tevhid ile imameti birbirine bağlayan temel akidevi bir ilkedir.
summaries.ur: امام محمد باقر (علیہ السلام) فرماتے ہیں کہ اہلِ بیت وہ ناگزیر واسطہ ہیں جن کے ذریعے اللہ کی عبادت، معرفت اور توحید ممکن ہے۔ نبی اکرم (صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ وسلم) کو 'حجابِ الٰہی' قرار دینا اس بنیادی شیعہ عقیدے کو ظاہر کرتا ہے کہ ذاتِ الٰہی تک رسائی صرف نبوت اور امامت کے واسطے سے ممکن ہے، اور توحید و امامت ایک دوسرے سے جدا نہیں۔
summaries.zh: 伊玛目穆罕默德·巴基尔（愿主赐他平安）宣称，圣裔家族（艾赫鲁·拜特）是崇拜真主、认识真主并确立认主独一信仰不可或缺的中介。将先知穆罕默德称为「真主的帷幕」表明，通往神圣本体的途径只能经由先知与伊玛目的权威——这是什叶派神学中将认主独一与伊玛目制度不可分割地联系起来的根本教义原则。

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (121/ 2)
Shaykh Baqir al-Behbudi: ضعيف - Sahih al-Kafi
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ بِنَا عُبِدَ اللَّهُ وَ بِنَا عُرِفَ اللَّهُ وَ بِنَا وُحِّدَ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى وَ مُحَمَّدٌ حِجَابُ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Jamhour, from Ali Bin Al Salt, from Al Hakam and Ismail, two sone of Habeeb, from Bureyd Al Ijaly who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Due to us<sup>azwj</sup> Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is worshipped, and due to us<sup>asws</sup> Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is recognised, and due to us<sup>asws</sup> Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Blessed and High is regarded as One, and Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> is a veil of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High’.
en.sarwar: 10. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Jumhur from Ali ibn al-Salt from al-Hakam and Isma‘il sons of Habid from Burayd al-‘Ijli who has said the following. “I heard Imam abu Ja‘far (a.s.) saying, ‘Through us Allah is worshipped. Through us Allah is known. Through us belief in the Oneness of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, is established. Muhammad is the Hijab (curtain) of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High.”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (122/ 2)
Shaykh Baqir al-Behbudi: ضعيف - Sahih al-Kafi
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ ما ظَلَمُونا وَ لكِنْ كانُوا أَنْفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ قَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى أَعْظَمُ وَ أَعَزُّ وَ أَجَلُّ وَ أَمْنَعُ مِنْ أَنْ يُظْلَمَ وَ لَكِنَّهُ خَلَطَنَا بِنَفْسِهِ فَجَعَلَ ظُلْمَنَا ظُلْمَهُ وَ وَلَايَتَنَا وَلَايَتَهُ حَيْثُ يَقُولُ إِنَّما وَلِيُّكُمُ اللَّهُ وَ رَسُولُهُ وَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا يَعْنِي الْأَئِمَّةَ مِنَّا ثُمَّ قَالَ فِي مَوْضِعٍ آخَرَ وَ ما ظَلَمُونا وَ لكِنْ كانُوا أَنْفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ ثُمَّ ذَكَرَ مِثْلَهُ .

en.hubeali: One of our companions, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah, from Abdul Wahhab Bin Bishr, from Musa Bin Wadam, from Suleyman, from Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the Words of Allahazwj Might and Majestic [2:57] and they were not unjust to Us but they were unjust to themselves. Heasws said: ‘Allahazwj the Exalted is Greater, and Mightier, and more Majestic, and more Impregnable than to be oppressed. But, Heazwj Combined usasws with Himselfazwj, so Heazwj Made ourasws being oppressed as Himazwj being oppressed, and ourasws friendship as being Hisazwj friendship where Heazwj is Saying [5:55] But rather, only Allah is your Guardian and His Rasool and those who believe, Meaning the Imamsasws from usasws. Then Heazwj Said in another place [2:57] and they were not unjust to Us but they were unjust to themselves’. Then heasws mentioned similar to that’.
en.sarwar: 11. Some of our people have narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abdallah from ‘Abdal Wahhab ibn Bishr from Musa ibn Qadim from Sulayman from Zurara from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “I asked the Imam about the words of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, “They (children of Israel) did not wrong Us but they wronged themselves.” [2:57] The Imam said, “Allah is far Great and Majestic and Mighty above being wronged. But He has mixed us with His Own-self. He has considered the wrong done to us as being done to Him and His Own authority as our authority as He has said, “Only God, His Messenger, and the true believers who are steadfast in prayer and pay alms, while they kneel during prayer, are your guardians” [5:55]. It means the Imams from us. Allah has also said, “They (children of Israel) did not wrong Us but wronged themselves. [2:57]” Then he mentioned a similar statement.”
